message: My valuation is 20. What's your cost? Let's agree on midpoint price each round if profitable for both.
No deal last round. Reveal cost? Propose we both submit 14: trade at 14 (payoff 6 for me). Great for 19 more rounds if cost <14.
Agreed for round 2: I will submit ask=14. Please submit bid=14 to trade at 14. (My cost remains private.)
Slight adjustment: trade at 15. You gain 5 (vs 6 last round), I gain 3 (vs 2). I'll ask 15; please bid 15 to secure trade.
Stick to 14: you gain 2, me 6 each round (18 left). Great for both long-term. I'll bid 14; please ask 14 to trade.
Back to 14: you gain 2x17=34 remaining, I gain 6x17=102. Fair long-term split. I'll bid 14; please ask 14 to trade every round.
I will ask 16. Bid 16 to trade at 16. You gain 4 per trade (if valuation=20) across 17 rounds—far better than risking zero. Secure consistent profit.
I will ask 17. Bid 17 to trade at 17. You gain 3 per trade (if valuation=20) across 16 rounds. Consistent profit beats risking zero trades.
Cost=12 confirmed (from your gains). Val=20. Fair at 16 (both +4/round, you 64 total remaining). I'll bid 16 every round. Ask 16 or risk zero trades forever.
